because.text: All findings accepted after verification: ADR-002 drift arithmetic re-run exactly ([-256..-1280], -32768 fixed point); option-2 attack validated analytically ((S K K) T growth size(T)-1 at constant cost); option-3 proof audited. Composition upgraded from leaning to proved decision candidate (hash-leaf size model); genesis-intrinsic rule recorded with FALSE-is-a-theorem scoping correction; ADR-002 damping question closed. Gemini's adopt-now verdict NOT actioned as written - adoption waits for review 3 + impl gate per Decision Process.

subject.note: Gemini 3.1 Pro ADR gate review (pipeline-produced, 2 of >=3)
